author: y4rr
content: Fixed all 3 'out of scope' findings from #672 follow-up. #673 (XPU storage redesign): dispatched sonnet subagent — added StorageBuffer::Cubecl variant, CubeStorageHandle trait, real H2D/D2H in TensorStorage::xpu_from_handle, Tensor::data() errors on XPU storage (PyTorch parity). All 13 portable_* ops now route handle-direct when inputs already on device. make_xpu_tensor single-allocation. New test xpu_chained_ops_stay_on_device verifies no host round-trips for intermediates. #674 (polynomial xpu wrappers): added xpu_polynomial! macro + 8 wrappers (chebyshev T/U/V/W, hermite H/He, laguerre L, legendre P) + stubs + 3 tests. Pre-existing no-feature warnings from #673 cleaned up (Arc/TensorStorage/check_xpu_tensor wgpu-gated). All verifications PASS: workspace build, all-features clippy -D warnings (both feature sets), workspace test, fmt. Phase 2 §3-violation cluster on XPU axis fully closed. ADR #663 items 5/6/7/8 still pending.
